description_long: This is a single-story rectangular bungalow with a flat, light gray roof and dark gray exterior walls. The structure is surrounded by a low perimeter wall, enclosing a small yard with green artificial turf and a few outdoor furnishings, including a bench and a basketball hoop. Several white-framed windows are evenly spaced along the visible facades, providing natural light to the interior. A driveway with a parked car is visible on one side, while the opposite side features a small fenced area and a circular structure, possibly a hot tub or pool. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a functional layout. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with metal and glass elements for windows and doors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, dark gray exterior, and enclosed yard featuring a driveway, windows, and outdoor amenities. The design is minimalistic with clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building, several windows, a driveway with a car, and a green yard with a basketball hoop.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the enclosed green yard, a white bench, a lounge chair, and a satellite dish.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the driveway, parked car, and a small fenced area with a circular structure.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the entrance, a white fence, and a circular structure adjacent to the main building.
